emails.subject: Re: Resume of Carla Di Castro
emails.body: Re: Resume of Carla Di Castro Shannon, I realize that the program is full. If I find a group interested in her, would you consider re-inviting her? Vince Shannon Rodgers 03/16/2000 01:52 PM

emails.subject: Re: Resume of Carla Di Castro
emails.body: Vince, We have many Associates that we have to place within business units. Thereafter, if there are additional hiring needs, we will consider her resume. Regards, Shannon Vince J Kaminski 03/16/2000 05:32 PM
